titles.title: There Is Healing in His Hands

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Yesterday it seemed so clear The way your life should be, But somehow things didn't come around Confusion leaves you in defeat.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: But, friend, it's time to find a new day There's healing for your needs And in Jesus' name I know you can receive

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: For there is healing in His hands for you Reach out and know there's healing power flowing Bring all your broken pieces to The One whose love can make you new There's healing in His hands for you

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: The promises in God's word Are for comfort and for peace For all the hurting in your heart You can find relief

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Oh, the joy of knowing Christ, the Savior Is more than life to me And in Jesus' name I know you can receive

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: For there is healing in His hands for you Reach out and know there's healing power flowing Bring all your broken pieces to The One whose love can make you new There's healing in His hands (Oh, there's healing in His hands)

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: For there is healing in His hands for you Reach out and know there's healing power flowing, Bring all your broken pieces to The One whose love can make you new

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: There's healing in His hands (Oh, there's healing in His hands) Healing in His hands for you, For you.
